description: 目標語系寫作層任務包：句級到段落級產出與評分

tasks.desc: Define writing layer contract (sentence -> paragraph) and node types.
Define writing prompt schema (goal, audience, register, constraints).
Define writing rubric profile (accuracy, coherence, task fulfillment, register).
Add TLG-005 generator input extension for writing nodes.
Implement TLG-006 gate checks for writing outputs and rubric completeness.
Pilot on KO A1/A2 with 2 units and collect QA defects.
